hotels.description_en:
Essential Facilities: Kura Ora Guest House in Rangiroa offers a garden and free WiFi. Guests can relax in the outdoor seating area or enjoy the patio with garden views.
Comfortable Accommodations: The hostel features ground-floor units with air-conditioning and private check-in and check-out services. Shared bathrooms include free toiletries and a microwave.
Convenient Services: The property provides a paid airport shuttle service, daily housekeeping, and a tour desk. An outdoor dining area with dining table and kitchenware enhances the stay.
Nearby Attractions: Tiputa Pass is less than 1 km away, and Rangiroa Airport is 3 km from the property.

Beachfront Location: Dream lodge I in Rangiroa offers a private beach area and stunning garden views. Guests can relax on the terrace or enjoy the outdoor seating and picnic areas.
Comfortable Accommodations: The guest house features family rooms with air-conditioning, balconies, and private bathrooms. Each room includes a kitchenette, washing machine, and free WiFi.
Convenient Facilities: Free airport shuttle service, laundry, and full-day security ensure a comfortable stay. Additional amenities include a coffee shop, outdoor dining area, and free on-site parking.
Local Attractions: Tiputa Pass is less than 1 km away, and Rangiroa Airport is 3 km from the property. Walking tours are available for exploring the surroundings.

hotels.description_en:
Beachfront Location: Le Coconut Lodge in Avatoru offers a private beach area and direct beachfront access. Guests can relax on the sun terrace or enjoy sea views from the garden.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and sea views. Additional amenities include free WiFi, minibar, and outdoor furniture.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves French and local cuisines with dinner options. Breakfast includes continental and Ã  la carte selections with juice, pancakes, and fruits.
Activities and Services: Guests can participate in walking, bike, canoeing, and snorkelling tours. Free bicycles are available, and the property provides a free airport shuttle service.
